task: I need to send my teacher a short note because an assignment plan changed at the last minute. The note should explain what happened and what I’m doing next, and I want it to stay brief and school-appropriate.

turns.agent_response:
Of course — here’s a short, school-appropriate note you can send:

**Subject:** Assignment Plan Update

Hi [Teacher’s Name],  
I wanted to let you know that my assignment plan changed at the last minute because of an unexpected issue. I’m working on adjusting my next steps and will get everything back on track as soon as possible. Thank you for your understanding.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]

If you want, I can also make it more casual or more formal.

user_simulator.text: That works. It’s short and clear, and it sounds like something I could send.
